chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI M. A. No. 21 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 23.09.2025 None present for appellant ---------- None present for appellant. No intimation is received. On last date, a cautionary order was passed. As a consequence, this M.A. is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
